titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Head of the Reconstruction Department of the British Foreign Office (Jebb)This message, in Stettinius’ handwriting, bears the following notation in the handwriting of Alger Hiss: “A. H. gave Jebb this message 2/9 12.30 p. m. during For. Mins. meetings”.

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Head of the Reconstruction Department of the British Foreign Office (Jebb)This message, in Stettinius’ handwriting, bears the following notation in the handwriting of Alger Hiss: “A. H. gave Jebb this message 2/9 12.30 p. m. during For. Mins. meetings”.
div.p: We must be sure—no respon.—rests on us relative to Iceland, Turkey, ete EgyptThe word “Egypt” is inserted in Hiss’ handwriting. on joining World Organ
